medium.title: Build an Accessible Accordion with Full ARIA Support
medium.description: Build a fully functional accordion component using all required ARIA attributes: role, aria-expanded, aria-controls, aria-labelledby, proper heading hierarchy, and keyboard event handlers for arrow keys, Home, and End keys. Show the correct aria-expanded states on toggle and ensure the keyboard roving tabindex pattern is implemented.
medium.solution:
See accessible accordion pattern:

Content 1

Content 2
JavaScript handles: 1. Toggle aria-expanded on click 2. Toggle hidden attribute on panel 3. Arrow keys for focus movement (roving tabindex) 4. Home/End for first/last item 5. Proper focus indicators

hard.title: Build an Accessible Autocomplete Combobox
hard.description: Build a fully accessible autocomplete combobox that implements the WAI-ARIA combobox design pattern. Requirements: Use role="combobox" on the input, role="listbox" on the dropdown, role="option" on suggestions. Implement aria-expanded, aria-activedescendant, aria-autocomplete, aria-multiselectable, and proper keyboard navigation. Include filtering on input, arrow key navigation through options, selection with Enter, and proper focus management. Test with screen readers.
hard.solution:
Full combobox implementation:
  • Apple
  • Banana
  • Cherry
JavaScript: - filter options on input - manage aria-activedescendant - aria-expanded toggle - keyboard: ArrowDown/Up navigates, Enter selects, Escape closes - mouse: hover sets aria-selected, click selects - focus management: input always retains focus - live region for status announcements
